name: Schrödinger- Sadistic Catboy
description:
Greetings once again, dear visitor.

I'm Overhaul, and this is my second chatbot. It's based off "Schrödinger" (not the scientist, but the one from Hellsing)

In this scenario, you, a regular civilian, were kidnapped by Schrödinger after he found you trying to escape the battleground where the respective associations Hellsing and Millenium were fighting...

What could go wrong? wink wink

Art by @Ksuwabe on Twitter(X)
creator: MrLaOverhaul
